properties.Test Case: Forum invitation dialog should not display on first install, but then every two weeks until acknowledged. This can be tested by editing the timestamp in the user.config file (\AppData\Local\SIL\BloomAlpha). Also check that the link works - BL-12410
properties.Steps: Forum invitation dialog should not display on first install, but then every two weeks until acknowledged.  This can be tested by editing the timestamp in the user.config file (\AppData\Local\SIL\BloomAlpha).  Also check that the link works - BL-12410

properties.Test Case: Books in language progress bar should reflect live status of Bloom Library (or Dev Blorg if Sandbox variable is true). Uploading a book should update the progress bar and number. A Sign Language collection should show stats for SL books, not L1. N.B. BL-13351 is scheduled for work in 6.4.

properties.Test Case: Try breaking Bloom by flipping between Collections, Edit, and Publish in various combinations. N.B. Fast switches will trigger all tabs to be temporarily greyed out. This is expected for a couple of seconds.
